south_bihar.climate: Semi-arid to sub-humid, drought-prone in some blocks

heat_stress.alert: High temperature may reduce germination. Provide shade net or irrigate nursery.

cold_stress.alert: Low temperature will slow germination. Delay transplanting.

excess_rain.alert: Heavy rain may damage nursery beds. Ensure drainage.

heat_stress.alert: Heat stress at tillering reduces tiller number. Maintain water level.

pest_risk.alert: High humidity increases BPH and Leaf Folder risk. Scout field immediately.

flood.alert: Submergence beyond 3 days will kill plants. Check for flood-tolerant varieties next season.

heat_stress.alert: CRITICAL: High temp at flowering causes spikelet sterility. Irrigate in evening.

cold_stress.alert: Cold at flowering causes poor grain set. Keep field flooded.

blast_risk.alert: Blast disease risk is HIGH. Spray Tricyclazole 75WP immediately.

rain_at_harvest.alert: Rain near harvest will delay cutting and cause grain discoloration. Plan harvest window carefully.

heat_stress.alert: High temp reduces grain weight. Maintain irrigation.
Too warm for wheat germination. Delay sowing or pre-soak seeds.

frost.alert: Frost risk. Cover seed beds if possible.

rust_risk.alert: Yellow rust risk HIGH. Scout crop. Spray Propiconazole 25EC if pustules appear.

aphid_risk.alert: Aphid conditions favorable. Check 10 shoots per acre.

heat_stress.alert: CRITICAL: Terminal heat stress. Irrigate immediately. Can cause 30-40% yield loss.

rain_at_flowering.alert: Rain at flowering may cause Karnal Bunt. Monitor crop.

cold_stress.alert: Maize germination fails below 12°C. Do not sow early.

heat_stress.alert: Soil surface too hot. Sow in evening, irrigate lightly.

FAW_risk.alert: Fall Armyworm conditions favorable. Check whorl for frass. Set pheromone traps.

waterlogging.alert: Maize cannot tolerate waterlogging. Drain field within 48 hours or yield loss occurs.

heat_stress.alert: CRITICAL: Heat at silking kills pollen. Irrigate twice daily.

drought.alert: Drought at silking = severe yield loss. Irrigate immediately.

aphid_risk.alert: Mustard aphid conditions favorable. Scout regularly. Spray Dimethoate if >20 aphids/plant.

frost.alert: Frost at flowering causes flower drop. Cover with straw mulch if possible.

white_rust_risk.alert: White Rust risk HIGH. Spray Mancozeb 75WP.

heat_stress.alert: High temp inhibits tuber formation. Potato needs cool nights (15-18°C).

late_blight_risk.alert: LATE BLIGHT ALERT: Conditions highly favorable. Spray Metalaxyl+Mancozeb immediately. Repeat every 7 days.

frost.alert: Frost will damage foliage and expose tubers. Earth up immediately. Spray water before frost.

general_weather_alerts.advisory: Heavy rain expected. Ensure proper drainage in all fields. Postpone spray operations. Do not apply fertilizer.
Flood risk high. Keep pumps ready for drainage. Do not go to fields. Contact block agriculture officer.
Heatwave conditions. Irrigate all crops in early morning. Do not spray pesticides. Ensure livestock have water and shade.
Cold wave alert. Irrigate wheat and potato fields (water retains heat). Cover nursery beds with polytene.
Dense fog increases disease risk in wheat and potato. Scout for rust and blight. Avoid sowing operations.
Dry spell alert. Prioritize irrigation for paddy, sugarcane, and vegetables. Check soil moisture before irrigating other crops.
